sponsors.name: Notion
sponsors.product_description: Notion is the all-in-one workspace for docs, projects, and knowledge management.
sponsors.script: Quick break to tell you about our friends at Notion. If your team's docs are scattered across Google Docs, Confluence, and random Slack messages — Notion puts it all in one place. Company wiki, project trackers, meeting notes — beautifully organized and actually searchable. Try Notion free at notion.so/signal.
